title: Find UNUSED and UNDRIVEN components in structs
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is a feature request from 2014 asking Verilator to add support for detecting unused/undriven components within struct data types. No code blocks or bug-triggering SV constructs were provided in the issue. The issue describes an absence of functionality (missing lint feature) rather than a specific SV construct that causes a compilation or runtime error.
